\tzpentry{ID3333}{Berry-Phase Mode Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3333 introduces Berry-Phase Mode Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \omega_m &= c \sqrt{k_z^2 + (m/R)^2} + \frac{2m \Omega}{n} \\ \Phi_{ \text{Berry}}^{(m)} &= \frac{2 \ln \varphi}{ \pi} m t \\ \Phi_{ \text{Sagnac}}^{(m)}( \Omega) &= \frac{4 \pi \Omega R^2}{ \lambda_0 c} m \end{align}
